---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case or the pain point.
"I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Scope and impact

- Who benefits from this change?
- Does it affect the governance workflow, the board, the CLI, or the UI?
- Is it a breaking change?

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request
here.
